title: Foolish - Boss Music Addon
description: Makes all boss-dropped music disc tracks play during their respective boss fights in the Foolish mod.
body:
Always felt rather odd how the music tracks from the discs dropped by the bosses didn't just play during their boss fights since they were likely intended as boss themes anyway. Because of that, I decided to take these matters to my own hands and make that a thing myself.

͏



### Requires [Foolish](https://modrinth.com/mod/foolish)

͏



Run the command _"/trigger fbmm.(insert boss id)\_theme.toggle"_ to toggle whether the corresponding boss theme should play or not.

Be sure to run the command _"/function foolish_boss_music_mod:admin/uninstall"_ before uninstalling the mod/data pack if you've had enough of it.
